heading:
Core
Values
description: Merging Filipino martial philosophy and technical craftsmanship.

quotes.text: From one thing, know ten thousand things.
quotes.attribution: Miyamoto Musashi (The Book of Five Rings)

values.title: Artistry & Craftsmanship
values.body: Find enjoyment in what you do and it will show. What separates good enough and great is invisible to most. It's the attention to details.

values.title: Simplicity & Directness
values.body: Employ only what is necessary and reduce complexity. Every line of code, every action, should be deliberate. Sloppiness compounds into failure.

values.title: Mastery & Discipline
values.body: Mastery makes difficult things look effortless. But the path to mastery is far from easy. It's showing up daily, doing the work, and refining what came before.

values.title: Continuous Flow & Improvement
values.body: Close-mindedness leads to stagnation. Failing to move could be fatal. If it's not working don't force it. There's always a better way. Find it.

nudge.text: If this resonates with you, and would like to work or train with me, let's talk.
